description: Approved exceptions to the file-size guard. A file may exceed its hard threshold up to approvedMaxLines. See docs/reference/FILE_SIZE_GUARD.md.

exceptions.reason: Generated from MODULE_REGISTRY.json by scripts/generate_catalog.py; grows with module count. Not hand-maintained.
exceptions.requiredFollowup: If it exceeds this, split the per-module detail section into a separate generated file.

exceptions.reason: Generated by scripts/maintenance/generate_tree.py; grows with the repository tree. Not hand-maintained.
exceptions.requiredFollowup: If it exceeds this, generate a depth-limited tree or split by top-level directory.

exceptions.reason: Frozen architecture baseline (Architecture & Scope Freeze). A single authoritative baseline document; splitting it would break the freeze reference.
exceptions.requiredFollowup: Do not grow further; new architecture detail goes into docs/architecture/*.md, not this baseline.
